benchmark: WearEdge OPEA TEI oneDNN verbose / Intel ISA evidence on GCP C3
capture_source: Cloud Shell pasted transcript from final-submission-2026-05-29-r23

dispatch_evidence.note: The run enabled oneDNN/DNNL/MKLDNN verbose capture and searched TEI/OPEA logs for oneDNN, DNNL, MKLDNN, AVX, AMX, BF16, VNNI, BRGEMM, and matmul markers. This TEI build did not emit matching dispatch lines in the captured logs.

probe_dispatch_evidence.note: The supplemental probe ran on the same GCP C3 VM as the WearEdge OPEA TEI scorecard path and captured oneDNN BF16/AMX/AVX512 dispatch markers. This proves host-level oneDNN dispatch evidence and is separate from the TEI container log result.

claim_boundary: This artifact proves that the official OPEA TEI + Qdrant + five-agent WearEdge scorecard ran successfully on a single-node GCP C3 c3-standard-4 profile with AVX-512 and AMX CPU flags detected, and that a same-host oneDNN BF16/AMX probe captured dispatch markers. It does not prove that the TEI model server itself emitted AMX or AVX-512 oneDNN dispatch markers.
